texto: I always thought that falling in love should feel like jumping from a cliff. A fall that scares you as much as it excites you, that leaves you breathless and wanting more. The impossible kind … that ruins you for everyone else. This wasn’t it, and my chances of finding it have just become harder. I am not the same girl that I was before. Finding that special guy prepared to carry my load with me, would be one in a million, a fairytale come true, and just maybe, an impossible dream…
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a MeChelle Vermeulen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I always thought that falling in love should feel like jumping from a cliff. A fall that scares y…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, fairytale, hurt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hurt e love.
